title: AgentSdkAdapter — RuntimeAdapter conformance; structured awaitResponse + tool-use, no scraping

tests.summary: sdk-adapter-ok — AgentSdkAdapter block (5 tests) green: passes runAdapterConformance (the shared harness: spawn→awaitReady→sendTurn→awaitResponse→teardown) with runtime id 'agent-sdk' and an injected fake SDK client; awaitResponse reads the SDK's structured messages directly (text + tool_use blocks, session_id) with NO scraping; buildQueryOptions wires the harness (preset/settingSources/maxTurns/cwd) + the fenced env (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL non-Anthropic, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ''); spawn ENFORCES the fence (Anthropic target without acceptApiBilling throws before any model call); setModel updates within the endpoint family; setEffort records effortApplied:false where the endpoint does not map effort.

notes: No PTY, no xterm. The real @anthropic-ai SDK is reached only via the default client factory, which lazy dynamic-imports lib/sdk-client.mjs AFTER assertFence() passes; tests inject createClient so the unit-test path never loads the SDK. The SDK was confirmed installable (npm view @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk → 0.3.179, pinned in the fitting package.json).
